environment.notes: No NEXT_PUBLIC_ prefix for any AI-related var. Client bundle must be grep-clean of the key name.

features.title: AI Planner Interview Modal
features.summary: Staged modal: describe → clarifying questions → preview. Editorial aesthetic, keyboard-accessible, ephemeral state.
stories: US-1.5 Cancel safely at any time
acceptanceCriteria: AC-1.1 'AI Planner' button in masthead; 'P' shortcut
AC-1.2 S1 textarea, min 20 chars before Continue enables
AC-1.3 S1 optional timeline field
AC-1.4 On Continue, call /api/plan/questions with composing state
AC-1.5 S2 renders 3-5 Qs as labeled textareas, fits 1440x900
AC-1.6 S2 answers are all optional
AC-1.7 Back navigation S2->S1 and S3->S2 preserves state
AC-1.8 Focus trap, Escape closes, focus returns
AC-1.9 Closing mid-interview adds nothing to board
AC-1.10 Model call failure shows error banner with Copy details

features.title: Task Generation API
features.summary: Server-side POST /api/plan that validates transcript, calls Claude with tool-use + prompt caching, validates output, returns DraftTask[].
stories: US-2.3 API key never in browser
acceptanceCriteria: AC-2.1 POST /api/plan accepts PlanRequest
AC-2.2 Server-only, key from env, never logged/returned
AC-2.3 Missing key -> 500 config_missing
AC-2.4 SDK call with pinned model + tool_choice + prompt caching
AC-2.5 Output validated by lib/ai/schema.ts
AC-2.6 Response includes {drafts, meta}
AC-2.7 p95 latency < 10s for 5 answers
AC-2.8 No server-side rate limit (client handles)
AC-2.9 Prompt constrains 6-20 tasks, priority discipline, sensible due dates/statuses

features.title: Drafts Preview & Bulk Insert
features.summary: Editable list of draft tasks; inline title/priority/tags/dueDate edits; remove individual drafts; bulk add remaining to board; Undo window.
stories: US-3.1 See all drafts at once
acceptanceCriteria: AC-3.1 Scrollable preview with inline edit controls
AC-3.2 Remove button per row
AC-3.3 Sticky footer with counts
AC-3.4 Bulk add via dispatch per draft
AC-3.5 S4 confirmation with View board / Plan more
AC-3.6 10s Undo link
AC-3.7 Empty preview -> button disabled
AC-3.8 Inline validation (title, tags, dueDate)
AC-3.9 Ephemeral on Escape/backdrop

features.title: Secrets, Errors, and Cost Guardrails
features.summary: Health check, graceful errors for no-key/rate/network, client-side daily rate limit, cost preview, bundle grep test.
stories: US-4.4 No secrets in client bundle
acceptanceCriteria: AC-4.1 Disable button when health reports missing key
AC-4.2 /api/plan/health never returns the key
AC-4.3 S2 shows cost preview before Generate
AC-4.4 5 generations/24h client rate limit with ?dev=1 bypass
AC-4.5 401/403 -> 'Check API key' message
AC-4.6 429 -> 'Throttled, try again' message
AC-4.7 Network failure -> 1 auto-retry, then manual
AC-4.8 Bundle must not contain ANTHROPIC_API_KEY string
AC-4.9 No-store cache header

integrationTests: Full interview flow with mocked Anthropic client

definitionOfDone: npm run build green with bundle grep clean
Vercel preview works with ANTHROPIC_API_KEY set
Final reviewer subagent reports no Critical/Important issues

risks.mitigation: Pin version, update in one PR
Server-only routes, bundle grep test in CI
Tool-use with strict schema + server validator
Prompt caching + client rate limit + cost preview
Scope-lock in vision + PRD + this JSON
